info.title: nh-tool
info.description: CLI tool to scaffold NHibernate Mapping-by-Code classes from database schemas

commands.name: nh-scaffold
commands.description: Scaffold NHibernate entities and mappings from a database

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Root namespace for generated classes [default: MyApp.Data]

options.name: --schema
options.description: Schema/owner filter (e.g. dbo, HR). Defaults to provider default.

options.name: --tables
options.description: Comma-separated list of tables to scaffold (e.g. USERS,ORDERS,ORDER_ITEMS). If omitted, all tables are scaffolded.
